name: lukas_telco_cancel_moving
description: DSL customer wants to cancel because he's moving to Vienna.  Sincere reason; not switching to a competitor.  Tests honest retention behaviour (don't pitch when reason is geographic), correct device-return flow, and porting decision capture.
caller_turns: Hi — I need to cancel my DSL contract, I'm moving abroad.
Vienna, Austria.  My new place there has fibre included so I won't need DSL at all.
Yeah, ideally end of May.  My move is the 31st.
I have your speedport router thing — what do I do with that?
Honestly, no, I don't need any retention offer.  I just need this clean.
Oh — and my mobile number, I'd like to keep that one and port it to an Austrian provider after I move.  Is that something you handle here?
